name: Vitamin C
summary: Supports immune function, collagen production, and antioxidant protection.

benefits.title: Immune support
benefits.body: Helps support immune cell function and protection.

benefits.title: Collagen + wound healing
benefits.body: Needed to make collagen for skin, connective tissue, and healing.

benefits.title: Antioxidant role
benefits.body: Helps protect cells from oxidative stress.

name: Vitamin A
summary: Supports vision, immune defense, and healthy skin epithelial tissues.

benefits.title: Vision support
benefits.body: Maintains healthy retinal function and supports night vision.

benefits.title: Immune Regulation
benefits.body: Helps maintain immune defenses against pathogens.

benefits.title: Skin and tissue health
benefits.body: Supports maintenance and repair of skin and epthelial tissues.

name: Vitamin D
summary: Helps regulate calcium absorption and supports bone strength and immune function.

benefits.title: Bone ineralization
benefits.body: Supports calcium absorption and bone density.

benefits.title: Immune modulation
benefits.body: Helps regulate immune response and inflammation.

benefits.title: Hormonal regulation
benefits.body: Acts as a hormone precursor influencing multiple metabolic processes.

name: Vitamin E
summary: Acts as an antioxidant protecting cells from oxidative damage.

benefits.title: Antioxidant protection
benefits.body: Neutralizes free radicals that damage cells.

benefits.title: Cell membrane protection
benefits.body: Helps maintain integrity of cell membranes.

benefits.title: Immune support
benefits.body: Supports immune cell function and signaling.

name: Vitamin K
summary: Essential for blood clotting and bone metabolism

benefits.title: Blood clotting support
benefits.body: Enables proteins required for normal blood clotting.

benefits.title: Bone metabolism
benefits.body: Supports bone mineralization and density.

benefits.title: Calcium regulation
benefits.body: Helps regulate calcium deposition in bones and tissues.

name: Vitamin B1
summary: Supports carbohydrate metabolism and nervous system function

benefits.title: Energy metabolism
benefits.body: Helps convert carbohydrates into usable cellular energy.

benefits.title: Nerve signaling
benefits.body: Supports healthy nerve communication.

benefits.title: Heart function
benefits.body: Supports cardiac muscle performance.

name: Vitamin B2
summary: Supports energy production and antioxidant enzyme systems.

benefits.title: Energy production
benefits.body: Helps convert nutrients into cellular energy.

benefits.title: Antioxidant support
benefits.body: Supports enzymes that protect against oxidative stress.

benefits.title: Tissue maintenance
benefits.body: Supports healthy skin and eye tissues.

name: Vitamin B3
summary: Supports metabolism, nervous system health, and skin maintenance.

benefits.title: Energy metabolism
benefits.body: Helps convert food into usable cellular energy.

benefits.title: Brain function
benefits.body: Supports neural signaling.

benefits.title: Skin maintenance
benefits.body: Supports healthy skin tissues.

name: Vitamin B5
summary: Supports fatty acid metabolism and hormone production.

benefits.title: Hormone synthesis
benefits.body: Helps produce hormones and neurotransmitters.

benefits.title: Fat metabolism
benefits.body: Supports megtabolism of fatty acids.

benefits.title: Energy production
benefits.body: Supports cellular energy pathways.

name: Vitamin B6
summary: Supports amino acid metabolism and neurotransmitter production.

benefits.title: Neurotransmitter production
benefits.body: Helps produce serotonin and dopamine.

benefits.title: Protein metabolism
benefits.body: Supports amino acid metabolism.

benefits.title: Red blood cell formation
benefits.body: Supports healthy blood cell production.

name: Vitamin B7
summary: Supports metabolism of carbohydrates, fats, and proteins and contributes to healthy hair, skin, and nails.

benefits.title: Energy metabolism
benefits.body: Helps convert carbohydrates, fats, and proteins into usable cellular energy.

benefits.title: Hair and skin health
benefits.body: Supports maintenance of healthy hair, skin, and nails.

benefits.title: Cellular metabolism
benefits.body: Supports enzyme systems involved in nutrient metabolism.

name: Folate
summary: Essential for DNA synthesis and healthy cell division.

benefits.title: DNA synthesis
benefits.body: Supports genetic replication and repair.

benefits.title: Red blood cell production
benefits.body: Supports healthy blood function.

benefits.title: Fetal development
benefits.body: Supports neural development during pregnancy.

name: Vitamin B12
summary: Supports nerve health and red blood cell production

benefits.title: Nerve maintenance
benefits.body: Supports protective coverings of nerve cells.

benefits.title: Red blood cell formation
benefits.body: Supports healthy blood cell production.

benefits.title: DNA synthesis
benefits.body: Supports cellular genetic processes.

name: Calcium
summary: Supports strong bones and teeth and plays an important role in muscle contraction and nerve signaling.

benefits.title: Bone strength
benefits.body: Helps build and maintain strong bones and teeth.

benefits.title: Muscle contraction
benefits.body: Required for proper muscle movement and contraction.

benefits.title: Nerve signaling
benefits.body: Helps transmit signals between nerves and muscles.

name: Iron
summary: Helps transport oxygen throughout the body and supports energy production.

benefits.title: Oxygen transport
benefits.body: Essential for hemoglobin to carry oxygen in the blood.

benefits.title: Energy metabolism
benefits.body: Supports cellular energy production.

benefits.title: Red blood cell production
benefits.body: Helps for healthy red blood cells.

name: Magnesium
summary: Supports hundreds of biochemical reactions including muscle function, nerve signaling,and energy production.

benefits.title: Muscle function
benefits.body: Helps muscles contract and relax properly.

benefits.title: Energy production
benefits.body: Supports cellular energy metabolism.

benefits.title: Nerve signaling
benefits.body: Helps regulate nerve impulses.

name: Phosphorus
summary: Supports bone health and helps the body produce and store energy.

benefits.title: Bone formation
benefits.body: Works with calcium to strengthen bones and teeth.

benefits.title: Energy storage
benefits.body: Helps produce ATP, the body's main energy molecule.

benefits.title: Cell structure
benefits.body: Supports formation of cell membranes.

name: Potassium
summary: Helps regulate fluid balance, nerve signals, and muscle contractions.

benefits.title: Fluid balance
benefits.body: Helps maintain proper fluid balance in the body.

benefits.title: Nerve signaling
benefits.body: Supports nerve communication.

benefits.title: Muscle function
benefits.body: Helps muscles contract properly.

name: Sodium
summary: Helps regulate fluid balance and supports nerve and muscle function.

benefits.title: Fluid regulation
benefits.body: Maintains proper fluid balance in the body.

benefits.title: Nerve transmission
benefits.body: Helps transmit nerve signals.

benefits.title: Muscle contraction
benefits.body: Supports muscle movement.

name: Zinc
summary: Supports immune function, would healing, and DNA synthesis.

benefits.title: Immune support
benefits.body: Helps immune cells fight infections.

benefits.title: Wound healing
benefits.body: Supports tissue repair and healing.

benefits.title: Cell growth
benefits.body: Supports DNA synthesis and cell division.

name: Copper
summary: Supports iron metabolism, energy production, and connective tissue formation.

benefits.title: Iron metabolism
benefits.body: Helps the body absorb and use iron

benefits.title: Energy production
benefits.body: Supports cellular energy reactions.

benefits.title: Connective tissue formation
benefits.body: Supports collagen and connective tissue formation.

name: Selenium
summary: Acts as an antioxidant and supports thyroid hormone metabolism.

benefits.title: Antioxidant protection
benefits.body: Helps protect cells from oxidative damage.

benefits.title: Thyroid function
benefits.body: Supports metabolism of thyroid hormones.

benefits.title: Immune support
benefits.body: Supports immune system function.

name: Manganese
summary: Supports metabolism, bone formation, and antioxidant activity.

benefits.title: Bone development
benefits.body: Supports bone formation and structure.

benefits.title: Metabolism support
benefits.body: Helps process carbohydrates and amino acids.

benefits.title: Antioxidant activity
benefits.body: Supports enzymes that protect cells.

name: Fiber
summary: Supports digestive health, helps regulate blood sugar, and promotes satiety.

benefits.title: Digestive health
benefits.body: Supports healthy digestion and gut function.

benefits.title: Blood sugar regulation
benefits.body: Helps slow carbohydrate absorption and stabilize blood sugar levels.

benefits.title: Heart health
benefits.body: Helps reduce cholesterol levels and support cardiovascular health.

name: Iodine
summary: Essential for production of thyroid hormones that regulate metabolism and growth.

benefits.title: Thyroid hormone production
benefits.body: Supports production of thyroid hormones that regulate metabolism.

benefits.title: Metabolic regulation
benefits.body: Helps control metabolic rate and energy usage.

benefits.title: Growth and development
benefits.body: Supports normal growth and neurological development.
